title: polydora chloropappa
side_effects: Polydora chloropappa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, the plant's toxins can cause dizziness, nausea, and vomiting, especially when ingested in large quantities. Improper use of Polydora chloropappa can also exacerbate existing health conditions, such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
